abilities.name: Dual Aura
abilities.text: As long as you have Latios or Latios ex in play, each player's Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex) can't use any Poké-Bodies.

tests.name: dual_aura_blocks_evolved_bodies
tests.description: Test that Dual Aura blocks Poke-Bodies of evolved non-ex Pokemon

tests.name: dual_aura_requires_latios
tests.description: Test that Dual Aura requires Latios or Latios ex in play

tests.name: dual_aura_allows_ex_bodies
tests.description: Test that Dual Aura does not block Pokemon-ex Poke-Bodies

tests.name: spearhead_draws_card
tests.description: Test that Spearhead draws a card
